::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\AddToShipoutPictureBG*{\AtPageUpperLeft{\includegraphics[width=\paperwidth,height=\paperheight]{images/ch1_cover.jpg}}}
\null
\newpage
\pagecolor{thesissand}
:::

# General Introduction

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\vspace{1cm}
\begin{center}
\textit{How can habitat enhancement structures support the restoration of kōura populations in Aotearoa New Zealand's lakes?}
\end{center}
:::

::: {.content-visible unless-format="pdf"}
![](../images/ch1_cover.jpg){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

*How can habitat enhancement structures support the restoration of kōura populations in Aotearoa New Zealand's lakes?*
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\afterpage{\pagecolor{thesiscream}}
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}
